info.name: ABS Cloud API — Complete
info.description:
Full API collection for ABS Cloud backend (NestJS, port 5000).

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection.
2. Set collection variable `base_url` = `http://localhost:5000`.
3. Call `POST /api/auth/login` → copy the token → set `jwt_token` variable.
4. All JWT-authenticated requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}` automatically.

**Tally Sync endpoints** use `x-tally-key: {{tally_key}}` instead of JWT. Default key: `abs-tally-2024`.

request.description: DB-independent health check. No auth required.
Returns JWT access_token. The test script auto-saves it to {{jwt_token}}.

item.name: Tally Sync (x-tally-key)
item.description:
These endpoints use x-tally-key header, NOT JWT. Tally calls these to pull and acknowledge vouchers.

New response format: bill_allocations are nested inside each ledger_entry row (not a flat top-level array).

Ledger entry shape:
{
  ledger_name, ledger_group, amount, direction, inventory: [],
  bill_allocations: [{ billname, amount, direction }]
}

request.description:
Returns vouchers where tally_synced_at IS NULL. Paginated, max limit 500.

Each voucher has ledger_entries[]. Each entry now contains its own bill_allocations[] — no more top-level bill_allocations array.
Includes already-acknowledged vouchers. Use for re-import or auditing.

query.description: Sales | Purchase | Payment | Receipt | Journal | Contra

request.description: Stamps tally_synced_at on the given IDs. Idempotent — safe to call multiple times. response.acknowledged = count of newly stamped rows.

item.name: Create Voucher — Journal / Contra / Payment / Receipt

request.description: Per-row bill_allocation: each entry has ledger_id matching the ledger_entries row it belongs to. Multiple ledgers can each be bill-by-bill.
Returns outstanding bill refs for a ledger. Used to populate bill allocation dropdowns.
Searches both customers and other-ledgers. Used in voucher ledger picker.
Set billbybill: "Yes" to enable per-ledger bill allocation in Journal/Contra/Payment/Receipt vouchers.
